name: The Timken Company
description: The Timken Company is a global industrial leader that designs, manufactures, and markets engineered bearings and industrial motion products. With a history spanning over 125 years, the company provides critical components and services that enhance the reliability and efficiency of machinery and equipment across diverse industries worldwide. Headquartered in North Canton, Ohio, Timken leverages its deep expertise in metallurgy, friction management, and power transmission to deliver innovative solutions that keep the world in motion. The company operates through two primary segments, Engineered Bearings and Industrial Motion, serving customers in sectors ranging from aerospace and automotive to renewable energy.
